item.title: Utz Quality Foods, LLC: 2.0 oz Dirty Maui Onion Chip, Plastic Bag. Recall
item.product: 2.0 oz Dirty Maui Onion Chip, Plastic Bag.
item.summary: Potential presence of Salmonella. Product details: 2.0 oz Dirty Maui Onion Chip, Plastic Bag.
item.affectedPeople: The recalled product was distributed to the following states. AL,AR,AZ,CA,CO,CT,FL,GA,IA,IL,IN, KY, LA,MA,MD,ME,MI,MN,MO,MS,NC,NJ,NV,NY, OH,OK,OR,PA,SC,TN,TX,VA,VT,WI
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
